entries.text: The Primal Club is a wild ride with 480 unique digital primates just waiting for their new homes! 🐒 Run by monkeys, fueled by chaos—this is where the good vibes are at. Minting earns you +3 bonus spins on the richart.app! 🔥 Check it out: https://richart.app/primal-club

High Rollers are all about efficiency! 🃏 Mint up to 5 at once in a single transaction, paying lower fees. Each edition gets its own unique inscription on Bitcoin, delivered directly to your Taproot address. Get ready to roll! 🎰 https://richart.app/high-rollers

Just stumbled upon the Cyber Spikes collection — these slim characters with massive spiky heads are next level! 🤯 The glowing-symbol faces and futuristic streetwear are a must-see. Minting earns you +3 bonus spins on the richart.app spinner! 🔥 https://richart.app/spikes
